'''yasoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placator|placator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placator|placator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yasoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæsereth|yæsereth]] || [[word:yæserej|yæserej]] || [[word:yæseresh|yæseresh]] || [[word:yæsere|yæsere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasosoroth|yasosoroth]] || [[word:yasosoroj|yasosoroj]] || [[word:yasosorosh|yasosorosh]] || [[word:yasosoro|yasosoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasoroth|yasoroth]] || [[word:yasoroj|yasoroj]] || [[word:yasorosh|yasorosh]] || [[word:yasoro|yasoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasofroth|yasofroth]] || [[word:yasofroj|yasofroj]] || [[word:yasofrosh|yasofrosh]] || [[word:yasofrof|yasofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yasorotho|yasorotho]] || [[word:yasorojo|yasorojo]] || [[word:yasorosho|yasorosho]] || [[word:yasoroko|yasoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yasoroth|yasoroth]] || [[word:yasoroj|yasoroj]] || [[word:yasorosh|yasorosh]] || [[word:yasoro|yasoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yasorothol|yasorothol]] || [[word:yasorojol|yasorojol]] || [[word:yasoroshol|yasoroshol]] || [[word:yasorokol|yasorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yasorothotho|yasorothotho]] || [[word:yasorojojo|yasorojojo]] || [[word:yasoroshosho|yasoroshosho]] || [[word:yasoroko|yasoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yasorothon|yasorothon]] || [[word:yasorojon|yasorojon]] || [[word:yasoroshon|yasoroshon]] || [[word:yasorokon|yasorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yasorothoro|yasorothoro]] || [[word:yasorojoro|yasorojoro]] || [[word:yasoroshoro|yasoroshoro]] || [[word:yasorokoro|yasorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
